2605.19766.title: Synthesis and Evaluation of Long-term History-aware Medical Dialogue
2605.19766.paper_summary: An effective healthcare agent must be able to recall and reason over a patient's longitudinal medical history. However, the absence of datasets with realistic long-term dialogue timelines limits systematic evaluation. Real clinical text is constrained by privacy and ethics, while existing benchmarks focus on isolated interactions, failing to capture cross-session reasoning. We introduce a framework for synthesizing high-quality, long-term medical dialogues with LLMs. Our approach entails a knowledge-guided decomposition into three stages: constructing synthetic patient profiles with diverse disease and complication trajectories, generating multi-turn dialogues per encounter, and integrating them into a coherent longitudinal history dataset, MediLongChat. We establish three benchmark tasks-In-dialogue Reasoning, Cross-dialogue Reasoning, and Synthesis Reasoning-to evaluate the memory capabilities of healthcare agents. To assess data quality, we introduce a multi-dimensional evaluation framework combining vector-based metrics with LLM-as-a-judge assessments. Specifically, we define automatic measures-Faithfulness, Coherence, and Diversity-together with two LLM-based evaluations: Correctness and Realism. Benchmark experiments show that even state-of-the-art LLMs struggle with MediLongChat. These findings highlight the benchmark's applicability and underscore the need for tailored methods to advance healthcare agents.
2605.19766.paper_summary_zh: 有效的醫療代理必須能夠回憶並推理患者的長期醫療歷史。<lb/>然而，缺乏具有現實長期對話時間線的數據集限制了系統評估。<lb/>真實的臨床文本受到隱私和倫理的限制，而現有的基準則專注於孤立的互動，未能捕捉跨會話的推理。<lb/>我們引入了一個框架，用於合成高質量的長期醫療對話，使用大型語言模型（LLMs）。<lb/>我們的方法涉及知識引導的分解，分為三個階段：構建具有多樣疾病和併發症軌跡的合成患者檔案，為每次就診生成多輪對話，並將它們整合成一個連貫的長期歷史數據集，MediLongChat。<lb/>我們建立了三個基準任務——對話內推理、跨對話推理和合成推理——以評估醫療代理的記憶能力。<lb/>為了評估數據質量，我們引入了一個多維評估框架，結合基於向量的指標和LLM作為評判的評估。<lb/>具體而言，我們定義了自動測量——忠實性、一致性和多樣性——以及兩個基於LLM的評估：正確性和現實性。<lb/>基準實驗顯示，即使是最先進的LLMs在MediLongChat上也面臨挑戰。<lb/>這些發現突顯了基準的適用性，並強調了推進醫療代理所需的量身定制方法。
2605.19766.author: Hebin Hu et.al.
2605.19766.authors: Hebin Hu, Renke Dai, Ah-Hwee Tan, Yilin Kang
